title: Apple anuncia novo iPhone com chip M5
summary: Apple revelou hoje o iPhone equipado com processador M5, promete saltos em IA no dispositivo.

title: Apple iPhone ganha chip M5 e foco em IA local
summary: O novo iPhone da Apple traz processador M5 com NPU dedicada para IA local.

title: Apple unveils M5-powered iPhone
summary: Apple introduced an iPhone built around the new M5 chip with stronger on-device AI.

title: New iPhone with Apple M5 chip announced
summary: Apple announced the M5 iPhone today with focus on on-device AI workloads.

title: OpenAI lança GPT-5 para desenvolvedores
summary: OpenAI liberou GPT-5 via API com janela de contexto ampliada e custo por token reduzido.

title: OpenAI GPT-5 chega com contexto maior
summary: O GPT-5 da OpenAI traz contexto expandido e novos modos de raciocínio via API.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5 to developers
summary: OpenAI has shipped GPT-5 to API developers with a larger context window and new reasoning modes.

title: GPT-5 OpenAI dev preview
summary: OpenAI GPT-5 developer preview opens with larger context and cheaper tokens.

title: Tesla Robotaxi recebe atualização de software
summary: Tesla liberou atualização para o Robotaxi com melhorias em rotas urbanas.

title: Tesla Robotaxi gets major software update
summary: Tesla pushed a major software update to its Robotaxi fleet improving urban navigation.

title: Tesla Robotaxi update boosts navigation
summary: Tesla Robotaxi fleet receives software boost to navigation stack and pickup accuracy.

title: Robotaxi software update rolling out
summary: Tesla Robotaxi software rolls out updates to urban pickup routing and passenger handoff.
